header.supersedes: run 2 (retained as record; unverified corpus + broken fidelity classifier)
header.execution_mode: scoped pilot (business/finance-leaning repos) pending decision to scale to full corpus

corpus.dataset: X-COBOL: A Dataset of COBOL Repositories
corpus.identity_basis: stale 2023 zenodo_record.json removed by maintainer; 2024 upload confirmed by maintainer; on-disk corroboration: 168 repos in final_repo_statistics.csv and repo_code_statistics.csv, 5195 .cbl/.cob/.cobol files, COBOL_Files dir dated Dec 2024

rules.rule_summary: INSS social-security is 8/9/11% by salary band, capped above the ceiling.

fidelity_events.risk: <= 1556,94 rendered via is-below 1556.95 (0.01 scale shift)
<= 2594,92 rendered via is-below 2594.93
<= 5189,82 rendered via is-below 5189.83

fidelity_events.limn: permit gross-salary is above 0 and gross-salary is below 1556.95
fidelity_events.risk: each EVALUATE WHEN was a compound (lower AND upper) bound, made explicit as two and-joined comparisons

rules.rule_summary: Family allowance is paid per child at 41.37 for low salaries and 29.16 for a middle band.

fidelity_events.risk: <= 806,80 rendered via is-below 806.81 (0.01 scale shift)
<= 1212,64 rendered via is-below 1212.65

fidelity_events.limn: permit base-salary is above 806.81 and base-salary is below 1212.65
fidelity_events.risk: the WHEN combined three conditions with AND across a continuation line, split into explicit and-joined comparisons

rules.rule_summary: Monthly interest is the transaction-category balance times the annual rate divided by 1200.

fidelity_events.limn: remember a value called monthly-interest with category-balance multiplied by annual-rate divided by 1200
fidelity_events.risk: interest formula has no ROUNDED keyword; generic decimal arithmetic

rules.rule_summary: A transaction is refused as over-limit when the new balance would exceed the credit limit.

fidelity_events.risk: >= rendered via swapped strict is-above; equality must remain inside the limit

rules.rule_summary: The working balance is current cycle credit minus debit plus the new transaction amount.

fidelity_events.limn: remember a value called temp-balance with current-cycle-credit minus current-cycle-debit plus transaction-amount
fidelity_events.risk: plain COMPUTE without ROUNDED; arithmetic carries across directly

rules.rule_summary: A transaction of zero or more is posted as a credit; a negative amount is posted as a debit.

fidelity_events.risk: >= 0 on a 2-decimal amount rendered via is-above -0.01 (scale-unit shift)

fidelity_events.limn: permit transaction-amount is above -0.01 / permit transaction-amount is below 0
fidelity_events.risk: the rule classifies by sign of the amount

rules.rule_summary: A transaction received after the account expiration date is refused.
A transaction is included in the report only if its processing date falls within the start and end dates.
A bill payment is refused when the account balance is zero or less (nothing to pay).

fidelity_events.risk: <= 0 on a 2-decimal balance rendered via is-below 0.01 (scale-unit shift)

rules.rule_summary: The municipal property-tax share is the municipal base times the municipal rate over 100, rounded.

fidelity_events.limn: remember a value called municipal-tax with municipal-base multiplied by municipal-rate divided by 100
fidelity_events.risk: COBOL applies ROUNDED to the euro; base arithmetic drops the half-up rounding step

rules.rule_summary: Records must arrive in non-descending key order; an out-of-order key is a severe error.

fidelity_events.risk: >= rendered via swapped strict is-below; equal keys must stay valid

rules.rule_summary: The prior adjusted base is the prior base times the prior-year multiplier, rounded.

fidelity_events.limn: remember a value called prior-adjusted-base with prior-base multiplied by prior-multiplier
fidelity_events.risk: COBOL applies ROUNDED (half-up); base arithmetic has no rounding directive, so the rounding step is dropped

rules.rule_summary: A prior adjusted base that comes out negative is floored to zero.

fidelity_events.risk: strict < 0 negative-sign test mapped directly to is-below 0 (no boundary shift)

rules.rule_summary: A cash withdrawal is rejected when it exceeds the balance or is exactly zero.

fidelity_events.limn: forbid withdrawal is above balance / forbid withdrawal is 0.00
fidelity_events.risk: the COBOL OR condition is split into two independent forbid statements so the disjunction is explicit

rules.rule_summary: A transfer is rejected when the requested amount exceeds the account balance.

fidelity_events.risk: strict > between amount and balance maps directly to is-above

rules.rule_summary: The monthly service charge steps down as the balance crosses 100000, 10000, 5000, 1000 and 0.

fidelity_events.cobol: IF WS-SRV-BAL-N IS GREATER THAN WS-SRV-BAL5
fidelity_events.risk: strict GREATER THAN comparisons map directly to is-above; no boundary shift

fidelity_events.cobol: IF WS-SRV-BAL-N IS GREATER THAN WS-SRV-BAL5
fidelity_events.limn: five ordered permit lines, highest threshold first
fidelity_events.risk: the cascade of GOTO-on-match IF blocks is order-sensitive; rendered as ordered permits so the first matching tier wins

rules.rule_summary: Funds cannot be transferred out of an account that is already in negative balance.

fidelity_events.cobol: IF WS-XFER-ACCT-FROM-BAL-N IS LESS THAN ZERO
fidelity_events.risk: strict < 0 negative-sign test mapped directly to is-below 0

rules.rule_summary: A transfer amount may not exceed the available balance in the source account.

fidelity_events.cobol: IF WS-XFER-AMT-NUM-N IS GREATER THAN WS-XFER-ACCT-FROM-BAL-N
fidelity_events.risk: strict > between two variables maps directly to is-above; no boundary shift

rules.rule_summary: A loan interest rate must be greater than zero.

fidelity_events.cobol: IF WS-CALC-WORK-PERC-N IS NOT GREATER THAN ZERO
fidelity_events.risk: inclusive <= 0 (NOT GREATER THAN ZERO) rejection rendered via strict is-above 0

rules.rule_summary: A loan interest rate of 100% or more is rejected as outrageous.

fidelity_events.cobol: IF WS-CALC-WORK-PERC-N IS NOT LESS THAN 100.000
fidelity_events.risk: inclusive >= 100 (NOT LESS THAN 100.000) rejection rendered via strict is-below 100

rules.rule_summary: A loan term may not exceed 1200 months (100 years).

fidelity_events.risk: strict > 1200 maps directly to is-above 1200; no inclusive boundary to shift

rules.rule_summary: The monthly loan payment is the standard amortization formula, rounded.
